Bash(cd "/c/Meine Websites/AI Trading Journal & Performance Analyzer" && git add next.config.js src/hooks/useTradeStorage.ts src/hooks/useFocusTrap.ts src/app/settings/page.tsx src/app/page.tsx src/components/TradeForm.tsx src/components/TradeDetailModal.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix 5 high-severity security, data integrity, and accessibility issues

- Webhook URL validation: enforce HTTPS-only in fireWebhook and test
  webhook, preventing SSRF and javascript:/data: URL attacks
- CSP: remove unsafe-eval from script-src, disable deprecated X-XSS-Protection
- Settings validation: add isValidSettings\(\) to sanitize localStorage data,
  reject non-HTTPS webhook URLs, validate platform enum and widget booleans
- Cloud sync: replaceTrades now clears Supabase before bulk upsert to prevent
  stale trades from persisting when local state diverges
- Focus trap: add useFocusTrap hook for modal dialogs \(TradeForm,
  TradeDetailModal\) — traps Tab/Shift+Tab within modal, auto-focuses
  first element, restores previous focus on close

EOF
